title: Mannequins
description:
Bring your world to life with fully customizable, craftable mannequins that look and behave like real players.
Equip them with items, change their poses, swap their skins, and create dynamic scenes across your world.
body:
# KETKET'S MANNEQUINS ## TUTORIAL VIDEO ![Main](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/117019767/526614222-09b8caf9-92aa-40cc-b721-b17cdd04816e.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NjczODU5MzIsIm5iZiI6MTc2NzM4NTYzMiwicGF0aCI6Ii8xMTcwMTk3NjcvNTI2NjE0MjIyLTA5YjhjYWY5LTkyYWEtNDBjYy1iNzIxLWIxN2NkZDA0ODE2ZS5wbmc_.AiJax-ocqEO8DPisqeOGu7lTPF5ppOF-uJfwbEeQyx8) Bring your world to life with fully customizable mannequins that look and feel like real players. Equip them with items, change their poses, swap their skins, and create dynamic scenes anywhere in your world. Perfect for decoration, storytelling, and adventure maps. — with more features and add-on packs coming soon. **More add-ons and features are already in development — stay tuned for updates!** ## CRAFTING ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbd5991ea50118513e598819d6e5a60d7ec456b4.png) ## TOOLS * **Pose Stick** - Rename any stick to “pose” using an anvil. Shift + Left-Click: Cycles through built-in poses (swimming, sneaking, etc.). Shift + Right-Click: Makes the mannequin rotate to face the nearest player. * **Name Tag** - Rename a name tag normally to use the following interactions: Shift + Right-Click: Changes the mannequin’s skin. Shift + Left-Click: Toggles always-visible custom name. Right-Click (no shift): Changes the mannequin’s custom name. * **Pose Compass** - Rename any compass to “pose” using an anvil. Shift + Right-Click: Rotates the mannequin’s head sideways. Shift + Left-Click: Tilts the head downward. ## INTERACTIONS * Throwing a Golden Apple at a mannequin instantly restores its health to full. * Shift + Right-Click with an empty hand will safely and easily kill the mannequin. * When a mannequin dies, it drops all equipment and items it was carrying.
Check My Other Projects - **[Silk/Fortune Switch](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ketkets-silk-fortune-switch)** - Instantly switch between Fortune and Silk Touch enchantments on your tools with a simple right-click. - **[Display Cases](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ketkets-displaycases)** - Interactive display cases that can store items, change appearance, and emit redstone signals when occupied. - **[Better Cauldrons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ketkets-better-cauldrons)** - Throw dirt or concrete powder into a water-filled cauldron to instantly create mud or concrete. Wash dyed blocks and items back to their clean form with an intuitive, vanilla-friendly system. - **[Mannequins](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ketkets-mannequins)** - Add fully customizable mannequins that can hold items, change poses, swap skins, and bring your world to life. - **[UndyingRefill](https://modrinth.com/datapack/undyingrefill)** - Automatically replaces a used Totem of Undying by pulling another one from your inventory—or even from the first shulker box containing a totem. Never fumble your totems again. - **[Graves](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ketket-graves)** - This datapack creates a grave when a player dies, safely storing their items. Retrieve your belongings without worrying about losing them! - **[Quick Shulker Boxes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/quick-shulker-boxes)** - Quick Shulker Boxes lets you open Shulker Boxes while holding them, without needing to place them on the ground. Simply shift-right-click to access your shulker boxes. - **[Stackraft](https://modrinth.com/datapack/stackraft)** - Compress farm items like sugarcane, gunpowder, and more to save space. Perfect for managing large farms and keeping your inventory organized. Also works with the new Auto Crafters. - **[EasyCoords](https://modrinth.com/datapack/easycoords)** - Displays your coordinates, daytime, and direction on screen, simplifies location sharing, and shows death coordinates in chat. - **[Better Hanging Signs](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-hanging-signs)** - It will enable your hanging signs to hold items. - **[FurnniCraft](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ketkets-furnicraft)** - Furnish your creations with a wide variety of unique furniture in the vanilla style, without the need for any resource packs.

## EXTERNAL LINKS [](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/efeketket/) [](https://github.com/efeketket) [](https://buymeacoffee.com/efeketket)
## UNINSTALL ``` /function ketket_npc:uninstall ```
